project: AI Video Production Workspace Three Route Plan
title: Regeneration Strategy For Review Notes
scope: turn Jenn's regenerate_requested review notes for SHOT_001, SHOT_003, and SHOT_004 into a local regeneration strategy
revise action constraints, prompt guidance, negative constraints, and per-shot regeneration risk notes
draft a future bounded RunningHub regeneration authorization plan without executing it
do not include SHOT_002 replacement decision in this task
goal: Prepare a local regeneration strategy for the three regenerate_requested shots without calling providers.
acceptance: R3-9F decision report is parsed as the source of truth.
Only SHOT_001, SHOT_003, and SHOT_004 are included as regeneration candidates.
SHOT_002 is explicitly excluded and routed to R3-9H.
SHOT_001 strategy addresses food picked from lunchbox and brought to mouth, not picking up the lunchbox.
SHOT_003 strategy addresses realistic cap fold and fabric behavior when pulled.
SHOT_004 strategy addresses physically plausible cap lighting and shadow realism.
Each candidate has revised prompt guidance, negative constraints, source keyframe/artifact reference, duration_seconds=6, and future output directory plan.
Budget draft is bounded to max_upload_calls_total=3 and max_submit_calls_total=3, one upload and one submit per candidate, no retry, no second submit, no batch expansion, and no Runway fallback.

Report records network_call_attempted=false, runninghub_called=false, runway_called=false, provider_credits_consumed=false, real_video_generated=false, regeneration_performed=false, secret_values_exposed=false.
validation: JSON parse for generated regeneration strategy report
boundary_or_safety_stop: strategy only; no provider call, regeneration execution, final assembly, or deployment
safe_actions_completed: Parsed R3-9F decision apply report as the source of truth.
Prepared local regeneration strategy for g0_r1_shot_001, g0_r1_shot_003, and g0_r1_shot_004.

Did not call providers, execute regeneration, assemble final video, overwrite source assets, or expose secrets.
options_for_jenn: Run R3-9H to decide the separate g0_r1_shot_002 path.
